Tank Fitting Kit - 22 mm - '95-'01 Magneti Marelli
Use when converting from OEM fuel-injection systems to use a carburetor in order to deliver adequate fuel for large-displacement engines
Replaces the factory tank fittings, allowing the use of a high-quality, high-flow Pingel fuel valve to feed the carburetor
Made in the USA
Due to tight tolerances in the tank fittings, a Pingel fuel valve is the only one that will fit.
Custom In-Line Fuel Valve
Designed with the bike builder in mind
Eliminates the need to worry about fuel valve location
Simple on/off valve without reserve or filter
Made in the USA
High-Flow Fuel Valve with Custom Knob - 22 mm
Custom knob features a detent for positive "on" position with ball-milled grooves that gives the valve a nice grip and a custom look
Substantially higher fuel flow than OEM or aftermarket fuel valves
Very universal; will work in any tank location
Valve features a brass body with show-quality chrome plating
Easy-to-read on, off and reserve positions
Made in the USA
Petcock Bung - Aluminum - 22 mm
Designed to be welded directly to the fuel tank
Great for custom tanks or repairing stock tanks
Made in the USA
Petcock Bung - Aluminum - 3/8" NPT
Designed to be welded directly to the fuel tank
Great for custom tanks or repairing stock tanks
Made in the USA
Weldless Tank Bung
Use when an alternative fuel source is needed, like when installing a nitrous oxide "wet" kit on fuel-injected motorcycles or as a fitting for an oil tank
1/8" NPT internal thread size for hose barb
CNC-machined from billet aluminum; includes a high-quality Viton O-ring for a positive seal, a stainless steel nut and washer and an 80 micron filter
Made in the USA
Power-Flo™ Petcock Fuel Valve - Honda
Provides maximum fuel for combustion - test results have proven as much as twice the fuel flow over stock petcocks
Machined from lightweight billet aluminum; not a cast piece like the OEM petcock
Uses stock mounting holes and hardware for easy bolt-on installation
Eliminate the stumble in long whooped-out sections
Ensures consistent fuel mixture under all conditions
Keeps the carburetor full of fuel at all times
Lighter than the stock petcock
Made in the USA

Hex Fuel Valve - Aluminum - 16 mm
Substantially higher fuel flow compared to OEM or aftermarket fuel valve
Necessary for adequate fuel delivery even on stock motorcycles and a must for high performance
Made in the USA
All descriptions are made from a seated position on the motorcycle with a reference from outlet position to the on, reserve and off position of the fuel valve lever.

How to measure your bolt pattern: If you don't have a measuring instrument such as a dial caliper to measure the center to center bolt distance on your stock fuel valve, try this method: bend a piece of stiff wire into a horseshoe shape and center the ends from bolt to bolt. Then transfer that measurement to a ruler.
Not legal for use in CA.

Provides maximum fuel for combustion - test results have proven as much as twice the fuel flow over stock petcocks
Machined from lightweight billet aluminum; not a cast piece like the OEM petcock

Eliminate the stumble in long whooped-out sections

Adapter Nut - Chrome - 22 mm
For '86-'06 Harley-Davidson
The adapter nut is threaded onto the male bung of the tank with the fuel valve threaded into the nut
Chrome plated brass
Nylon gasket included
Made in the USA
Vacuum Fuel Valve - Left-Side Forward
The same feature as OEM vacuum fuel valves - when valve is left in the "on" position with the motor off, fuel flow is shut off automatically
High-quality, lustrous chrome finish is the same as Pingel's Power-Flo line of fuel valves
Outlet is a single 5/16" hose barb and will accept the stock vacuum line

Available for '75-'93 models with a 22 mm external thread - will also work for '94-'99 models with 22 mm thread to eliminate vacuum shut off - available for '66-'74 tanks internally threaded for 3/8 NPT
Made in the USA
All descriptions are made from a seated position on the motorcycle with a reference from outlet position to the reserve position of the fuel valve lever.
Will also fit '84-'93 models if a vacuum source is tapped.
Vacuum Fuel Valve - Downward
The same feature as OEM vacuum fuel valves - when valve is left in the "on" position with the motor off, fuel flow is shut off automatically
High-quality, lustrous chrome finish is the same as Pingel's Power-Flo line of fuel valves
Outlet is a single 5/16" hose barb and will accept the stock vacuum line

Available for '75-'93 models with a 22 mm external thread - will also work for '94-'99 models with 22 mm thread to eliminate vacuum shut off - available for '66-'74 tanks internally threaded for 3/8 NPT
Made in the USA
All descriptions are made from a seated position on the motorcycle with a reference from outlet position to the reserve position of the fuel valve lever.
Will also fit '84-'93 models if a vacuum source is tapped.

Chopper Fuel Valve - Chrome
Designed for use on bikes with custom fuel tanks that are raised high in front, which doesn't allow proper fuel pickup with a standard reserve fuel valve
Keeps the bottom of the tank clean from fuel lines, giving universal options for mounting the fuel valve with mounting holes on the back of the valve
Smooth, clean lines with a compact design that measures 2" L x 1-1/2" H x 1-3/8" D
Easy-to-operate position selector knob with a ball detent for positive on/off/reserve locating
Two 5/16" hose inlets with one 5/16" hose outlet

Offers better fuel flow and retains the stock crossover connection of your '35-'65 style Harley-Davidson split fuel tanks

Drop Bracket - Fairing Mirror - Black - '96-'13
Provide the same clear image with the OEM mirrors as compared to the shaky-blurred image when using handlebar-mounted mirrors
Unique design drops the OEM fairing mount mirrors for that cool Bagger look on models with tall bars
Mounting hardware and instructions included
Billet aluminum with a black finish
Made in the USA
Designed specifically for FLHX models, but will also fit FLHT models by drilling small holes in the inner fairing.
Not for use with stock handlebars; rider will not see past arms.

Shock Lowering Bracket Kit - Rear - Lowers 1.00" - Black - '97-'01 FL
Makes the motorcycle much easier to get off the side stand and gives more rider control over the motorcycle with its lower center of gravity
Lowers your bike 1" leaving adequate room for stock tire-to-fender clearance; designed to retain the use of the stock rubber shock boot
CNC-machined with a black finish
Easy to install in approximately 30 minutes with common tools, and includes instructions and hardware
Made in the U.S.A
Rear lowering kits are not to be used in conjunction with "shorty" shocks or "low-profile" shocks.

Shifter Kit - Sportster
Electronically suspends the ignition system, allowing the transmission to smoothly shift up or down with just the push of a button
Shift up at partial or full throttle and back down at the touch of a button
No need to use the foot shifter; clutch is used only when starting or stopping
Works for normal street riding or full-throttle shifting
Perfect match for male and female riders who own bikes that require a lot of hand strength to pull in the clutch lever
OEM shifting ability is retained after installation

Includes a dual-button handlebar control, a shift cylinder plated with a lustrous chrome finish, bolt-on shift cylinder support bracket and a state-of-the-art control module that sends a quick signal from the handlebar control to the shift cylinder
Includes electronic ignition kill module and step-by-step instructions with photos for easy installation

Universal kit also available with dual-button handlebar control to fit 7/8" or 1" diameter handlebars/clip-ons; installation may require purchase of frame tube brackets for shift cylinder mounting (sold separately)
Made in the USA
Not suitable for 4-speed transmissions.

Hex Fuel Valve - Flag Chrome - 22 mm
Substantially higher fuel flow compared to OEM or aftermarket fuel valve
Necessary for adequate fuel delivery even on stock motorcycles and a must for high performance
Made in the USA
All descriptions are made from a seated position on the motorcycle with a reference from outlet position to the on, reserve and off position of the fuel valve lever.

How to measure your bolt pattern: If you don't have a measuring instrument such as a dial caliper to measure the center to center bolt distance on your stock fuel valve, try this method: bend a piece of stiff wire into a horseshoe shape and center the ends from bolt to bolt. Then transfer that measurement to a ruler.
Not legal for use in CA.
Vacuum Fuel Valve - Left-Style Forward
The same feature as OEM vacuum fuel valves - when valve is left in the "on" position with the motor off, fuel flow is shut off automatically
High-quality, lustrous chrome finish is the same as Pingel's Power-Flo line of fuel valves
Outlet is a single 5/16" hose barb and will accept the stock vacuum line

Available for '75-'93 models with a 22 mm external thread - will also work for '94-'99 models with 22 mm thread to eliminate vacuum shut off - available for '66-'74 tanks internally threaded for 3/8 NPT
Made in the USA
All descriptions are made from a seated position on the motorcycle with a reference from outlet position to the reserve position of the fuel valve lever.
Will also fit '84-'93 models if a vacuum source is tapped.

Oil Pump Screens - Twin Cam
Designed to protect the oil pump and cam plate from debris off the chain-tensioners or other particles that may come loose in a Twin Cam engine
Great to put in when doing a cam bearing job
Keeps cam bearing rollers from dropping into the center section of your engine, which could ruin the oil pump and cam plate

Does not restrict oil flow - in testing the engine returned the same amount of oil back to the oil tank in an allotted amount of time; the screens de-aerate the oil more, which drops oil temperature 5-10°F
Easy-to-install and clean
Made in the USA
For use with OEM oil pumps only.
Oil Dipstick - Victory
Dress up the right side of the Victory with this custom highly polished billet aluminum dipstick
Easily replaces the unsightly stock one, using the stock O-ring for installation
Made in the U.S.A.
Shifter Kit - FL/FX
Electronically suspends the ignition system, allowing the transmission to smoothly shift up or down with just the push of a button
Shift up at partial or full throttle and back down at the touch of a button
No need to use the foot shifter; clutch is used only when starting or stopping
Works for normal street riding or full-throttle shifting
Perfect match for male and female riders who own bikes that require a lot of hand strength to pull in the clutch lever
OEM shifting ability is retained after installation

Includes a dual-button handlebar control, a shift cylinder plated with a lustrous chrome finish, bolt-on shift cylinder support bracket and a state-of-the-art control module that sends a quick signal from the handlebar control to the shift cylinder
Includes electronic ignition kill module and step-by-step instructions with photos for easy installation

Universal kit also available with dual-button handlebar control to fit 7/8" or 1" diameter handlebars/clip-ons; installation may require purchase of frame tube brackets for shift cylinder mounting (sold separately)
Made in the USA
Not suitable for 4-speed transmissions.

Universal Shifter Kit
Revolutionary device electronically suspends the ignition system while simultaneously shifting the transmission, allowing smooth gear shifts up or down at the push of a button
Clutch use is eliminated except for starting and stopping
The unit works for normal riding or full-throttle shifting and the ability to clutch and shift normally is retained
Kit will work on most machines that have a foot-operated shifter with a hand clutch and requires a battery

Hex Fuel Valve - Chrome - 3/8" NPT

How to measure your bolt pattern: If you don't have a measuring instrument such as a dial caliper to measure the center to center bolt distance on your stock fuel valve, try this method: bend a piece of stiff wire into a horseshoe shape and center the ends from bolt to bolt. Then transfer that measurement to a ruler.
Not legal for use in CA.
